data.title: Elizabeth Warren Accuses Trump of Market Manipulation Over Tariff Chaos
data.description:
U. S. Senator Elizabeth Warren is taking a bold stand against President Donald Trump, accusing him of manipulating the markets through his erratic tariff decisions
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/elizabeth-warren-accuses-trump-of-market-manipulation-over-tariff-chaos/

data.title: Are people still buying Andrew Tate’s crypto?
data.description:
In 2024, popular influencer Andrew Tate reversed his previous stance and decided to get involved with cryptocurrencies, investing in Bitcoin (BTC), endorsing – though some might say shilling – blockchains, and promoting a self-themed meme coin: Daddy Tate (DADDY). During the year, DADDY recorded notable gains as the celebrity posted numerous social media posts urging his followers to invest and saw several peaks. Shortly after launch, in mid-June, it hit its all-time high (ATH) at $0.2641
source: https://finbold.com/are-people-still-buying-andrew-tates-crypto/

data.title: OpenSea pushes for separate rules for NFT platforms.
data.description:
The post OpenSea pushes for separate rules for NFT platforms. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) not to classify NFT platforms under federal securities laws
source: https://coinpedia.org/crypto-live-news/opensea-pushes-for-separate-rules-for-nft-platforms/

data.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson says Bitcoin will hit $250k and Mag 7 will adopt stablecoins in 2025
data.description:
Charles Hoskinson, founder of Cardano and co-creator of Ethereum, told CNBC that Bitcoin could hit $250,000 either by the end of 2025 or possibly even before the year is out.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hoskinson-bitcoin-250k-mag-7-stablecoins/

data.title: Dogecoin ETF Dreams Advance as 21Shares Files with SEC
data.description:
21Shares has filed with the SEC to launch a spot Dogecoin ETF in the US, aiming to capitalize on rising institutional interest in meme-based cryptocurrencies.

The post Dogecoin ETF Dreams Advance as 21Shares Files with SEC first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/10/21shares-files-for-dogecoin-etf/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=21shares-files-for-dogecoin-etf

data.title: Gate.io will launch Wayfinder(PROMPT) spot and contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch Wayfinder (PROMPT) spot trading at 21:00 (UTC+8) on April 10, and simultaneously open PROMPT perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement), supporting 1-50 times leverage.

data.title: Crypto Analyst Adjusts Strategy Amid Market Volatility
data.description: According to Odaily, crypto analyst Miles Deutscher has highlighted the extreme volatility in the current market, noting that even top global fund managers are struggling to navigate the situation. Deutscher describes the present environment as one of the worst for short to medium-term fundamental trading. In response, he has adjusted his strategy to focus on holding long-term core positions for over ten months, managing risk, and actively de-risking some aggressive positions. Additionally, he plans to reduce trading activities and allocate more effort towards business development and long-term planning. Deutscher emphasizes the importance of 'surviving' the current market conditions to prepare for future benefits.

data.title: Paul Atkins Confirmed as SEC Chair, Prioritizes Digital Asset Regulation
data.description:
Paul Atkins confirmed as SEC Chair, impacting digital asset regulation amidst new U. S. Senate leadership.
source: https://coincu.com/331340-paul-atkins-sec-chair-digital-assets

data.title: Gate.io launches TIA mining, with an expected annualized return of up to 14.02%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io has launched TIA mining, starting with 1 TIA, with an expected annualized return of up to 14.02%, including a basic annualized return of 10.52% and an additional reward of 3.5%. Participating in the Gate.io on-chain coin staking project, you can earn income every day without complicated operations. In addition, the basic annualized return of GT on-chain staking is 5.68%, and you can also get up to 2% additional rewards.

data.title: LBank will list Babylon (BABY)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Babylon (BABY) at 18:00 (SGT) on April 10, 2025, and open the BABY/USDT trading pair. The deposit service will be opened at 18:00 on April 10, 2025, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 18:00 on April 11, 2025.
